## Submission checklist

- [ ] My repo is public
- [ ] My repo contains a working RocketRide pipeline JSON or integration code
- [ ] My repo has a README
- [ ] My entry follows the exact format: `- [Name](url) - Description.`
- [ ] My entry is in alphabetical order within its section
- [ ] This link is not already listed
